message:
fix(bench): handle VDBE-wrapped constraint errors in retry logic

The `is_duplicate_insert_after_retry` function only matched
`FrankenError::PrimaryKeyViolation` and `FrankenError::UniqueViolation`,
but constraint violations can also appear as `FrankenError::Internal`
when they originate from VDBE execution (error code 19).

This caused spurious benchmark failures when a retry-after-BusySnapshot
succeeded but encountered a legitimate duplicate key from the original
transaction that actually committed.

Fix: Also check for Internal errors containing "code 19:" with
"PRIMARY KEY" or "UNIQUE" constraint text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
